<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler; use Monolog\LogRecord; /** * No-op * * This handler handles anything, but does nothing, and does not stop bubbling to the rest of the stack. * This can be used for testing, or to disable a handler when overriding a configuration without * influencing the rest of the stack. * * @author Roel Harbers <roelharbers@gmail.com> */ class NoopHandler extends Handler { /** * @inheritDoc */ public function isHandling(LogRecord $record): bool { return true; } /** * @inheritDoc */ public function handle(LogRecord $record): bool { return false; } }
